ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sports team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the team belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team participates in */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "home_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the division belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport played in the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "division_rank" TEXT /* Ranking within the division */,
  "league_rank" TEXT /* Ranking within the league */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins during the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses during the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws during the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff performance */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the playoffs for the team */,
  "round_reached" TEXT /* Round reached in the playoffs */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team in the playoffs */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the playoff match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport for which the tournament is held */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., cup, league) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament participation */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of participation */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the team in the tournament */,
  "round_reached" TEXT /* Round reached in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participations_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, fan, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., team profile, match data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the team during the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the team during the match */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the team during the match */,
  "possesion_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of possession held by the team during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
